description: CORTI 200.1-DUBINA — pre-built industry-standard formula library for the Math Studio rule editor. Insert any entry directly into a custom IR rule. All expressions use the safe rule-editor grammar (no eval).

formulas.name: Geometric retrigger (3+ scatter)
formulas.notes: Add +5 spins on every 3+ scatter retrigger. Standard L&W mehanika.

formulas.name: Soft retrigger (2+ scatter)
formulas.notes: Generous retrigger — 2 scatters give +2 spins.

formulas.name: Sticky multiplier compound ×2
formulas.notes: Doubles current multiplier each trigger. Common in WMS Wizard of Oz.

formulas.name: Increment multiplier +1 per FS
formulas.notes: +1 each Free Spin. Linear growth — Bally Quick Hit.

formulas.name: Win multiplier scaling (×1.1)
formulas.notes: Each cascade chain boosts win by 10% with max-win clamp.

formulas.name: Aggressive cascade scaling (×1.25)
formulas.notes: Quad-cascade — 25% per chain. NetEnt Gonzo's Quest style.

formulas.name: Pity bonus (>200 spins)
formulas.notes: Force a bonus after 200 dry spins.

formulas.name: Pity bonus (>500 spins, hardcore)
formulas.notes: High-volatility pity floor.

formulas.name: Loss compensation (+1% RTP)
formulas.notes: Soft floor — sets RG boost flag after deep loss streak.

formulas.name: RG session cap (>100u)
formulas.notes: Hard session cap — flags for jurisdiction RG hooks.

formulas.name: Max-win clamp
formulas.notes: Standard regulator-mandated payout ceiling.

formulas.name: H&W respin reset to 3
formulas.notes: Reset respin counter on every new blocker. Bally Cash Wheel.

formulas.name: H&W orb value × current_mult
formulas.notes: Apply meta multiplier to each captured orb.

formulas.name: Expanding wild — full reel
formulas.notes: Each wild expands to full reel height.

formulas.name: Walking wild speed 1
formulas.notes: Wild advances 1 reel per spin.

formulas.name: Scatter count payout
formulas.notes: Quadratic scatter payout — common in old-school Aristocrat.

formulas.name: FS award · 3 scatters → 10 spins
formulas.notes: Standard 3-scatter ladder entry.

formulas.name: FS award · 4 scatters → 15 spins
formulas.notes: Mid ladder.

formulas.name: FS award · 5 scatters → 20 spins
formulas.notes: Top ladder.

formulas.name: P(3+ scatters in 5 reels @ p=0.1)
formulas.notes: Closed-form scatter trigger probability.

formulas.name: Normal PDF at win_amount
formulas.notes: Density of current win under normal volatility assumption.

formulas.name: Mystery trigger probability
formulas.notes: Every-50-spin mystery beacon — IGT Mystery of the Lamp.

formulas.name: Weekend RTP boost (+1%)
formulas.notes: Sat/Sun weekend promo boost (operator-side, off by default).

formulas.name: Tier-based jackpot award
formulas.notes: 4-tier jackpot ladder via nested if.

formulas.name: RTP floor at 0.85
formulas.notes: Jurisdiction compliance — enforce 85% floor.

formulas.name: RTP ceiling at 0.985
formulas.notes: Operator-mandated max RTP.

formulas.name: Wild substitution payout
formulas.notes: Linear wild-count boost to base win.

formulas.name: E[total FS] with retrigger p=0.18
formulas.notes: Geometric series sum for retrigger-bearing FS.

formulas.name: Cluster min-5 payout
formulas.notes: Cluster pays — min 5 matching symbols.

formulas.name: Symbol upgrade LP→HP
formulas.notes: Upgrade pays 3× when LP→HP morph triggers (Aristocrat Buffalo Gold).

formulas.name: Multiplier ladder step
formulas.notes: Climb the ladder every 5 spins.

formulas.name: Linked jackpot seed delta
formulas.notes: 1% of every bet seeds linked progressive jackpot.

formulas.name: Anywhere pay count threshold
formulas.notes: WMS Anywhere Pays — 8+ matching gives 10× per symbol.
